q3: The closing line was a persistent struggle — it kept landing on descriptions of clarity rather than actual clarity, which is a subtle but real distinction. The body of the email clicked into place pretty well once we got going, but I spent way too many rounds trying to articulate why the ending felt off when I felt like the model should have been able to extrapolate from the pattern we'd already established. It also pushed back on writing a full draft at one point when I just needed it to execute.
